3,658 animated icons

ebolax Animated Icons

Lucide, Heroicons, and Iconoir — CSS-only hover transitions. Click any button to copy the icon code with the <i> tag in one click.

View on GitHub

Install from npm

You can install this package from npm and use the built CSS and icons in your project.

npm i @ebolax/animated-icons

After installing, link the stylesheet from node_modules/ebolax-animated-icons/dist/animated-icons.css (or the minified animated-icons.min.css) and use the icon classes as shown below.

<link rel="stylesheet" href="node_modules/@ebolax/animated-icons/dist/animated-icons.min.css">

For the simplest setup, you can use the bundled animated-icons.bundle.min.css file, which includes all icons as embedded assets.
This means you do not need to copy or serve the aic-icons folder separately. 

<link rel="stylesheet" href="/path/to/animated-icons.bundle.min.css">

You can also import the CSS file directly into your JavaScript or TypeScript project using import or require: 

import "@ebolax/animated-icons";

Or, for CommonJS projects: 

require("@ebolax/animated-icons");

Basic usage

Basic usage: Just add an i tag with the aic class and the icon's class name. For example:

<!-- Heroicons -->
<i class="aic aic-hero-academic-cap"></i>

<!-- Iconoir -->
<i class="aic aic-io-mail"></i>

<!-- Lucide -->
<i class="aic aic-luc-home"></i>

Using icons inside buttons or links

When an icon is used inside a parent element (button, link, nav item), wrap the icon with a container that has the aic-wrapper class. This keeps the animation and hit area correct when the user hovers the parent.

<button class="aic-wrapper">
  <i class="aic aic-luc-accessibility"></i> Test
</button>

Change the animation

You can change the animation by adding the --aic-animation style variable attribute to the icon. The value is the name of the animation. For example, to change the animation to bar, you can add the style="--aic-animation: aic-bar;" attribute to the icon.

<i class="aic aic-hero-arrow-path" style="--aic-animation: aic-bar;"></i>
DEMO

Available animations (you can click to change the animation):

bar

bell-ring

dot-appear

fade

gear

heart-beat

mail-flap

nudge-up

nudge-down

nudge-left

nudge-right

nudge-right-up

nudge-right-down

nudge-left-up

nudge-left-down

page-turn

pulse-element

rocket-lift

scale-pop

shake

spin

Advanced Usage

You can change that style variables:

  • --aic-size: 1em;
  • --aic-duration: 600ms;
  • --aic-ease: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1);
  • --aic-origin: center;

For Example:

<i class="aic aic-hero-arrow-path" style="--aic-size: 48px; --aic-duration: 2000ms;"></i>
DEMO
